compiled_state.title: RED: add test_dependency_check_section_present structural test and .test-index marker
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Story
4c55-0c7a — As a new project member, I am prompted to install missing dependencies before onboarding proceeds

## testing_mode
RED

## What
Add structural test `test_dependency_check_section_present` to `tests/skills/test-onboarding-skill.sh` and a corresponding RED marker to `.test-index`.

The test should grep `SKILL.md` for dep-check structural signals (keywords: `/bin/bash`, `coreutils`, `brew`, optional dep with timeout pattern) to verify the dependency pre-scan section exists in Phase 1 Step 0. Per behavioral testing standard Rule 5, do NOT assert on exact wording — check structural boundary only.

## Files to Modify
- `tests/skills/test-onboarding-skill.sh` — add `test_dependency_check_section_present()` function and call it before `print_summary`
- `.test-index` — add entry: `plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md:tests/skills/test-onboarding-skill.sh [test_dependency_check_section_present]`

## Acceptance Criteria
- `test_dependency_check_section_present` exists in test-onboarding-skill.sh
- Test greps for dep-check keywords in SKILL.md (e.g., `/bin/bash.*--version`, `coreutils`, `brew install`, optional timeout pattern)
- `.test-index` entry with RED marker added
- Test FAILS (RED) when run against SKILL.md before the dep-check section is added (Task 2)
- Follows behavioral testing standard Rule 5 (structural boundary, no content assertions)
